input:
Title: Add OpenAI adapter to LLM service
Author: Sam Wilson
Assignee: Priya Patel
Labels: feature, llm
Milestone: Run 2

Body:
The current implementation only supports Anthropic. We need an OpenAI adapter following the LLMServiceInterface protocol.

Tasks:
1. Implement OpenAIAdapter in packages/core/alayaos_core/llm/openai.py
2. Add ALAYA_EXTRACTION_LLM_PROVIDER=openai support to config
3. Unit tests with FakeLLMAdapter

Spec doc: https://docs.internal/llm-adapters
Due: Sprint 5 end (May 20, 2026)
